What is eTukTuk?

eTukTuk is an exciting play-to-earn game that puts you in the driver's seat of our flagship eTukTuk vehicle. Inspired by the Crazy Taxi style, you'll race through the vibrant streets of Sri Lanka, picking up and dropping off passengers who need to get to their destinations fast. The faster you drive, the more you earn!

In eTukTuk, you can upgrade your vehicle, unlock new cities, and embark on countless adventures. Our presale offers you an exclusive opportunity to be among the first to join this thrilling game. By participating in the presale, you'll gain early access to special in-game rewards, unique upgrades, and much more. Get ready to rev up your earnings and experience the ultimate play-to-earn adventure with eTukTuk!

Play eTukTuk
Play eTukTuk

Investors & Partners

How To Buy

Connect Wallet

To purchase $TUK Token you need to connect your wallet, which involves approving the contract on your wallet

Participate in Presale

Visit our presale platform and follow the instructions to purchase $Tuk tokens using your preferred cryptocurrency.

Receive Token

Once the presale is complete, your $TUK tokens will be automatically sent to your wallet address.

WHAT YOU GET WITH the $TUK token

With the $TUK token, you unlock exclusive benefits in the eTukTuk ecosystem. Use $TUK tokens to upgrade and customize your eTukTuk, access new cities and events early, and earn rewards as you play. Enjoy exclusive in-game content, participate in community events, and influence game development.

Hold $TUK tokens as valuable assets, benefiting from the game's growth. Embrace the full potential of eTukTuk and join a thriving community of players and investors driving towards success!

Etuktuk Roadmap

Launch the eTukTuk presale, offering exclusive early access to tokens and rewards. Build a strong community through social media campaigns and engaging content.

Officially launch the eTukTuk token on major cryptocurrency exchanges and distribute tokens to presale participants. Establish strategic partnerships with key players in the blockchain and gaming industries.

Accelerate game development, focusing on core mechanics and user experience. Launch a closed beta version for early supporters, gathering feedback to refine the game.

Release the full version of eTukTuk to the public, introducing additional features and regular updates. Expand the game’s reach globally, building a diverse and engaged player base.

FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

What is E-tuk tuk?
eTukTuk is an exhilarating play-to-earn game where you drive the flagship eTukTuk vehicle through the bustling streets of Sri Lanka. Inspired by the Crazy Taxi style, players pick up and drop off passengers quickly to earn rewards, upgrade their vehicles, and unlock new cities for endless adventures.
What are the $TUK token details?
The $TUK token is the native token on the blockchain that is the backbone of the eTukTuk ecosystem. The token contract address is 0x84E03e21dA9B32555885a85b7c23e5FC123C25DD. Please do not send any funds to this token contract address, as they cannot be recovered. $TUK can currently only be purchased through the official presale at buy.tuktoken.io
Why the $TUK token?
The $TUK token is the core currency of the eTukTuk ecosystem, enabling players to earn and spend within the game. It provides a seamless and rewarding experience by allowing for in-game purchases, upgrades, and access to exclusive content, while also fostering a vibrant community of players and investors.
When is the claim and launch of $TUK token?
Claiming your $TUK tokens and the public launch of the token will happen on the same day once the presale ends and will be announced once the date is confirmed. Announcements will also be made on CEXs and DEXs that you will be able to trade $TUK on, once they are confirmed.Should you have any further inquiries, please don't hesitate to reach out to our support team. We are here to assist you throughout this exciting journey.
How do I contact support?
To contact our support team, please email us atcontact@etuktuk.io Our dedicated support staff will be more than happy to assist you with any questions, concerns, or inquiries you may have. We strive to provide timely and helpful responses to ensure your experience with our project is smooth and enjoyable. Feel free to reach out to us at any time, and we look forward to providing you with excellent support and service. Thank you for choosing eTukTuk!
